title: kohleria andina
intro: Kohleria andina, a flowering plant species native to South America, is a member of the family Gesneriaceae and is also known as the Andean kohleria or kohleria. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of kohleria andina include the potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, kohleria andina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical applications.
